title: Outlook Node Draft Creation Fails with Deserialization Error
symptom: When attempting to attach a file to a draft in the Outlook node, the process fails with a 'were unable to deserialize' error message.
applies_when: Using Outlook node to create drafts
not_this_if: Using a different node or integration
root_cause: The error occurs due to improper formatting or encoding of the file attachment data being sent to the Outlook API. The Outlook node may not handle the attachment data correctly, leading to deserialization issues when the API processes the request.
fix_steps: Use an HTTP node to directly call the Microsoft Graph API endpoint for attachments.
Send a JSON body with the correct structure, including the file name, content type, and base64 encoded content.
Ensure that the API account is properly connected for authentication.
agent_instruction: Use an HTTP node to send the attachment directly to the Microsoft Graph API with the correct JSON format.
